title: Amtech - Digital Tyre Inflator Air Compressor and Car Tyre Pump for Quick Inflation, Easy to Use, Portable, Electric with LED Light, Car Essential with 3m Cord (12V)
availability_text: Only 2 left in stock (more on the way).
features: DRIVER’S ESSENTIAL: An effective air compressor tyre inflator for both emergencies and general maintenance to ensure proper tyre pressure, which can improve tyre lifespan and overall safety on the road. A must-have air pump for car tyres, vans, bikes and more!

QUICK INFLATION: Air tyre inflator with pressure gauge range of 1-115 PSI and various tyre pressure presets (PSI, BAR, KPA, KG/CM2) so you can easily choose the right one for your vehicle. A maximum running time of 10 minutes gets you back on the road in no time.

EASY TO USE: The illuminated LED gauge is easy to read, and there are 4 dial functions, including off, light, red flashing, and a SOS feature for emergencies. Automatically stops when the tyre reaches the desired pressure and is powered by a 3m cord that connects via the vehicle’s power source for hassle-free use.

PORTABLE: Compact and lightweight, the car tyre inflator 12v can be easily stored anywhere in the home, shed or garage, or even in the trunk or glove box of your vehicle for tyre maintenance wherever and whenever you need it. Includes three different adaptors for extra versatility.
description: Product Description Powerful With an accurate pressure range and various pressure presets, it can inflate tyres of cars, bikes, and other vehicles. Versatile Whether for regular tyre maintenance to improve overall safety on the road or for emergency situations, Amtech's air compressor has the performance and features you need to get the job done right. Easy to Use Amtech's air compressor is designed to be easy to use for everyone. With its lightweight design, easy-to-read LED digitial gauge, and auto-stop function, you get quick and easy inflation. Accessories Amtech's air compressor accessories expand its capabilities and are made with high-quality materials.
